overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a coastal fishing village at dusk. The character walks along dirt paths past stone and wooden Nordic-style buildings, examining beached longships and interacting with the environment while NPC villagers move about the settlement.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the narrow dirt path toward the harbor, with two swords visible on his back

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding down toward the coast
rough stone wall lining the right side of the path
tall evergreen trees on the hillside
tall wooden tower structure near the harbor
Viking-style longship beached in the distance with mast illuminated

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks down a narrow dirt path bordered by stone walls, descending toward a coastal harbor. The path is flanked by pine trees on the left and wooden scaffolding structures ahead, with the ocean and a distant beached longship visible in the background.

events.description: exits narrow path and enters open harbor area with beached Viking-style longships

agents.ego_description: looking around the harbor area, turning to examine the beached ships and coastal structures

entered.detail: large wooden Viking-style longship resting on the shore
calm sea stretching to the horizon under overcast skies
gravel and stone surface of the harbor shore
warm orange glow from a burning fire near the boats
tall wooden scaffolding structure used for ship maintenance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide harbor area where large wooden longships rest beached on the shore. Geralt looks around the harbor, examining the ships and wooden scaffolding structures while the ocean stretches out to the horizon under the dim dusk light.

events.description: turns away from harbor and begins ascending back up through the village center

agents.ego_description: walking up through the village center, passing close to NPC villagers and examining the stone buildings

notable_agents.action: villager in green tunic walking past Geralt on the left side of the path

entered.detail: small stone building with wooden roof and lit windows
warm orange light glowing from window of stone cottage
wooden market stall with goods displayed
stacked wooden barrels outside the buildings

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks back up from the harbor into the village center, passing stone cottages with warm lit windows. A villager in a green tunic walks past, and wooden stalls and barrels line the dirt paths between the Nordic-style buildings.

agents.ego_description: continuing to explore the village outskirts, walking along the path with the harbor visible to the side

entered.detail: wooden wagon cart parked beside the path
multiple orange glows from fires burning in the distance
dense evergreen forest covering the hillside beyond the village
tall wooden tower structure visible again near the harbor

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the village outskirts, Geralt walks past wooden carts and barrels along the dirt paths. The harbor with its beached ships remains visible to the left, while pine forests rise in the background and distant campfires glow in the evening twilight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined village path that gradually opens into a wide, atmospheric coastal harbor. It begins with Geralt descending a narrow dirt path bordered by stone walls and pine trees, moving toward wooden scaffolding structures. As the path clears, the perspective expands to reveal the ocean and a distant beached longship in the background. The scene then opens fully into the harbor area, where the camera pans to examine several large wooden longships resting on the shore under the dim light of dusk.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the cozy, inhabited center of a Nordic village toward its quiet, forested outskirts at dusk. It begins with Geralt walking away from the harbor, passing stone cottages with warm lit windows and wooden stalls lining the dirt paths as a villager in a green tunic crosses his way. As he moves further from the village core, the dense cluster of buildings gives way to open paths scattered with wooden carts and barrels. The scene then expands to reveal the beached ships of the harbor lingering to the left while the background shifts toward rising pine forests. Finally, the camera tracks Geralt toward the edge of the settlement where distant campfires glow softly against the deepening evening twilight.
